title: KeniUtils
description: A lightweight Spigot utility plugin for "vanilla" servers — dimension color system, chat, AFK tags, and more.
body:
# 🌟 KeniUtils

**Small and lightweight Spigot plugin for Vanilla servers (1.16–1.21.x).**  
No complicated configs, no bloat — just quality-of-life features.

---

## 🧰 Features

### 🗺️ Dimension Color Indicator
Displays the dimension you're currently in using color — in both tab and chat.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hoDhpALj/images/256b493158bae74ac80e445b4481b8008b0dcbdd.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hoDhpALj/images/b9a37a450b0b43bca2def2ec58f844f3459df039.png)

🔒 You can toggle your visibility with:
`/dimention private`
`/dimention public`

![Privacy Toggle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hoDhpALj/images/83b1e6fd4ee9bdc1853ec950b15398c649ee7f9c.png)

---

### 💬 Improved Private Messages
Custom `/msg` system with a sound notification.

![Msg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hoDhpALj/images/b76fe367bf83733fc936af0ee3da809b39084231.png)

---

### 🕵️‍♂️ "Who killed Kennedy?"
If you're killed by a player while they're invisible, their name is hidden from the death message.

![Invisible Killer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hoDhpALj/images/bb91862dafc0bcb6815137daa0e13834079dd015.gif)

---

### 😎 Custom Join/Leave Messages
Replaces boring login messages with something more fun. Why? Just because.

![Join/Leave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hoDhpALj/images/b9f8568d06c118f31fae1dadb9ef872acf292703.png)

---

### 💤 AFK Icon
If you're idle for more than a minute, an [AFK] tag appears next to your name in the tab list.

![AFK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hoDhpALj/images/09c265b1e163494caf3913a354beb047e45e33ec.png)

---


### 🌟 Mention player
![M](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hoDhpALj/images/0ee0c55a982ca55dbe2271c278be22cb68934017.png)
---
## 📦 Simple. Fast. Functional.

**KeniUtils** adds small but impactful improvements to the game experience without unnecessary clutter.

---
